title: CrispTadkaMascarpone
description: A fresh, crisp, energizing Kenyan dish featuring mascarpone and tadka, perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: tadka spices (optional)
ingredients.notes: includes mustard, cumin, and other aromatic seeds

instructions: Whisk mascarpone with heavy cream until well combined.
Heat a small amount of oil in a pan over medium heat. Add tadka spices for a few seconds to release their flavors, then remove from heat and stir into the mascarpone mixture.
Season with salt according to your taste preference.
Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve.
